chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1167 of 2021. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 22.08.2022. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, Additional Prosecutor General. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. ORDER MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- It is alleged, that applicant is a Class-IX student, aged about 14 years, and on account of a dispute over agricultural land caused a blunt side hatched blow to Muhammad Ibrahim alongwith his three other brothers who also beat him in village Ghulam Muhammad Nizamani on 20.10.2021. The injured was referred to hospital for medical examination and injury sustained by him was opined as u/s 337-A(ii) PPC. However, the certificate was challenged by applicant and as per opinion of the medical board, the injury falls u/s 337-L(i) PPC, punishment provided for that is Daman or imprisonment upto seven years. Learned counsel for the applicant pleading minority of the applicant and difference in medical opinion of different forum has requested for bail which has not been opposed by learned Additional PG stating that the case requires further inquiry. There is also delay of about 19 days in registration of FIR. More so, applicant is attending the Court regularly and has not misused the same. Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order 22.12.2021 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits.

Accordingly, this bail application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant vide order 22.12.2021 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Irfan Ali
